judgeReasoning: The response states that --json prints a JSON object describing the generation run and names the required output-path fields (llmsTxt, docsLlmsTxt, llmsFullTxt). It also mentions searchIndex, searchContent, sitemap, and robots which are bonus items. However, it invents/misnames some fields (agentReadabilityJson instead of agentReadabilityManifest, sitemapXml/sitemapMd separately, robotsTxt) and omits the --bundle mode shape and the mode/source/output/product/groups fields.
